title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Meets AI Guidance Update
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind’s DSA practice now pairs real-time AI assistance with problem-solving and updated authentication flow visuals.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, new Google Sign-In, and an upgraded Code Breach tower-defense aesthetic to deepen learning through interactive play and AI-assisted problem solving.
cta: Try a practice problem with AI help now and sign in with Google for a seamless learning session.
visual_brief: Static hero-style graphic featuring a coding editor split-screen with AI assistant chat on one side and a live DSA problem on the other; include subtle cyberpunk UI elements and a prominent CodeGrind logo.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
